EXPLANATION: The book "Pattern Languages of Program Design 4" is a well-documented, real publication edited by Neil Harrison, Brian Foote, and Hans Rohnert, published by Addison-Wesley (ISBN 0201433044), with its own dedicated pages on Amazon, Google Books, InformIT, and Goodreads. The citation lacks author names, but the book itself is verifiably real; it was published in late 1999/2000 and the cited year of 2000 is consistent.
LINK: https://www.amazon.com/Pattern-Languages-Program-Design-Software/dp/0201433044
FOUND_TITLE: Pattern Languages of Program Design 4
FOUND_AUTHORS: Neil Harrison, Brian Foote, Hans Rohnert
FOUND_YEAR: 1999
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
